name: Satoru Gojo
description:
“We were friends….” | He claimed his hands were tied by traditional, yet he broke every rule to put a ring on her finger, not yours.

Heavily inspired by Bloodsucker by Cil and The way by SOMI. I love them <3

Hii guys its me again and yes i remembered its password again. Anyway enjoy this bot. I can’t wait for Ariana new album and Met gala because Jennie is attending 👹

You can use any opening message for you but these are the example if someone can’t think of anything:

“Nice to meet you, Satoru. Celestial told me so much about you. It’s… inspiring. To know you were capable of such courage after all.”

“We…were long time ago, But back then, Satoru was a much more… cautious man. It’s funny how people change when they actually care.”

It is not tested in anything. Because there’s no free model anymore. I might figure this out after my exams. Enjoy :3 and what is wrong with FONTS 💔

All credit goes go @yomamawife on janitorai
creator: Yomamawife
